# **DISCLAIMER**

DISCLAIMER: Multi Asset Generational, LLC and affiliated entities (Multi Asset Generational) represent a private equity group investing in real estate, startups, and other alternative asset classes, through projects that include securities offerings that are exempt from registration with the Securities Exchange Commission under Rule 506(c). Multi Asset Generational offers investment projects to accredited investors. These projects include many risks. ALL INVESTOR CAPITAL COULD BE SUBJECT TO PARTIAL OR TOTAL LOSS.

Multi Asset Generational and its officers are not financial advisors, CPAs, or legal advisors and do NOT act as your financial advisor nor offer financial or investment advice. Investors make their own investment decisions. We encourage prospective investors to meet with their advisors to discuss the risks, forecasts, terms, and conditions of any of our investment projects. WE RECOMMEND INVESTORS REFER TO THE PRIVATE PLACEMENT MEMORANDUM TO READ AND COMPREHEND ALL THE INFORMATION ABOUT OUR PROJECTS BEFORE INVESTING.

![](https://images.leadconnectorhq.com/image/f_webp/q_80/r_1200/u_https://assets.cdn.filesafe.space/GnJkO74jhYsJ2BpYXOG1/media/68dca7313f93005b7fee5176.png)

La Laguna Apartments offer stylish one, two, and three-bedroom apartments. Enjoy modern living with thoughtfully designed spaces that cater to both individuals and families.

Whether you need the cozy comfort of a one-bedroom, two-bedrooms or spacious layout of a three-bedrooms, our apartments provide the perfect setting for your lifestyle. Experience comfort and convenience in a welcoming community.

**OFFICE:**

[1535, 1539 & 1543 Conner Rd.](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Laguna+Apartments/@32.7390837,-96.6840439,635m/data=!3m2!1e3!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x864ea3413e108cf3:0x1ce96ea1e40ced8b!8m2!3d32.7390792!4d-96.681469!16s%2Fg%2F11cspx0010?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI1MDkyNC4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D)

[Dallas, TX 75217](https://www.google.com/maps/place/Laguna+Apartments/@32.7390837,-96.6840439,635m/data=!3m2!1e3!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x864ea3413e108cf3:0x1ce96ea1e40ced8b!8m2!3d32.7390792!4d-96.681469!16s%2Fg%2F11cspx0010?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI1MDkyNC4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D)

**CONTACT NO.:**

[214-272-7450](tel:+12142727450)

**EMAIL ADDRESS:**

[eastdallas@touchstonepm.com](mailto:lnvmanager@touchstonepm.com)

**STAY IN TOUCH**

[![social media icon](https://stcdn.leadconnectorhq.com/funnel/icons/dark/facebook-dark.svg)](https://www.facebook.com/lalagunaapartments/)[![social media icon](https://stcdn.leadconnectorhq.com/funnel/icons/dark/instagram-dark.svg)](https://www.instagram.com/lalagunaapartments/)

# © 2025 LA LAGUNA APARTMENTS

All material presented herein is intended for information purposes only.

summary: La Laguna Apartments offers modern one, two, and three-bedroom apartments designed for comfort and convenience, suitable for individuals and families. Located in Dallas, TX, the apartments aim to create a welcoming community experience. Key information includes a disclaimer about investment risks for prospective investors, emphasizing that Multi Asset Generational, LLC does not provide financial advice. Contact details include a phone number (214-272-7450) and an email address (eastdallas@touchstonepm.com) for inquiries.
